name: Wei Dun

sections.short-biography: When Gongsun Zan sent Liu Yu’s head to capital, Wei Dun stole Yu’s head to give it a burial.

full_text:
Wei Dun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Dun. When Gongsun Zan sent Liu Yu’s head to capital, Wei Dun stole Yu’s head to give it a burial. Wei Dun was affiliated with Liu Yu.
